response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates senior-level software engineering capability and modern full-stack skills, the role fundamentally requires deep C++ expertise as a core competency. This candidate has minimal professional C++ experience (last in 2015, approximately 1 year total) and recent work is entirely in TypeScript/Node.js/web technologies. The candidate also lacks background in industrial automation, embedded systems, and security standards (IEC 62443) that are central to the role. The technical foundation mismatch makes this a poor fit despite senior-level seniority.
strengths: 20+ years of proven senior/staff-level software engineering with consistent ability to lead and mentor teams across multiple domains
Modern cloud and full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS CDK—meeting advantageous skills requirements
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, and event-driven system design demonstrated across roles
concerns: Minimal C++ experience: approximately 1 year of professional work ending in 2015; role requires 8–12 years of active C++ development as primary competency
No background in industrial automation, embedded systems, real-time systems, or IoT—candidate's career is exclusively web, GIS, and data platforms
Missing required security and standards expertise: no evidence of SDL practices, IEC 62443 familiarity, MQTT protocol, industrial cybersecurity, or networking/multi-threading in C++

key_factors.factor: Security standards and embedded systems background
